---
title: "Artemia Matrix Population Model"
author: "Michael Roast"
date: "2026-04-01"
output:
  pdf_document: default
header-includes: \usepackage{bbm, amsmath, blkarray, mathtools, bigstrut, upgreek}
  \pagenumbering{gobble}
classoption: landscape
---

$$\begin{aligned}\mathbf{A} =
\begin{blockarray}{*{6}{c}l}
    \begin{block}{ccccccc}
     \ & C & N1 & N2 & N3 & A & \  \\
    \end{block}
    \begin{block}{r[ccccc]l}
      C &
        \phi_{C}(1-{h}_{C}) &
        0 & 0 & 0 &
        ((\phi_{A}{f}_{C})+(\phi_{N}\gamma_{N}{f}_{C})){P}_{C}\rho & \\
      N1 & 
        \phi_{C}{h}_{C} & 0 & 0 & 0 &
        ((\phi_{A}{f}_{N})+(\phi_{N}\gamma_{N}{f}_{N})){P}_{N}\rho & \\
      N2 &
        0 & \phi_{N}\gamma_{N} & 0 & 0 & 0 & \\
      N3 &
        0 & 0 & \phi_{N}\gamma_{N} & 0 & 0 & \\
      A & 
        0 & 0 & 0 & \phi_{N}\gamma_{N} & \phi_{A} & \\
    \end{block}
  \end{blockarray} \\
  \end{aligned}$$
